name: Whiskas Adult Cat Pouches Poultry/Feasts M/Pak 12x85g
shortDescription: Give your adult cat the delicious taste they crave and the balanced nutrition they deserve with WHISKAS 1+ Poultry Feasts in Gravy . Expertly crafted with 100% high-quality, sustainably sourced ingredients , this complete wet cat food provides everything your feline needs to stay healthy, active, and happy.
description: Give your adult cat the delicious taste they crave and the balanced nutrition they deserve with WHISKAS 1+ Poultry Feasts in Gravy . Expertly crafted with 100% high-quality, sustainably sourced ingredients , this complete wet cat food provides everything your feline needs to stay healthy, active, and happy. Each pouch is carefully prepared to preserve the natural goodness, aroma, and flavour of tender poultry, offering your cat a satisfying mealtime experience while supporting their long-term health. With added vitamin C, taurine, and zinc , it helps maintain a strong immune system, lean muscles, and a shiny coat. Key Benefits 100% Complete & Balanced Nutrition – Provides all the essential nutrients adult cats need for everyday health and vitality. Supports Strong Muscles – Made with high-quality animal protein to maintain lean muscle mass and strength. Healthy Skin & Shiny Coat – Enriched with zinc and essential fatty acids for coat health and radiance. Boosts Natural Defences – Includes vitamin C and taurine to support immune function and heart health. Sustainably Produced – Crafted using responsibly sourced ingredients; 85% of WHISKAS European factories already use renewable electricity. Ingredients With Chicken: Meat and animal derivatives (34%, including 4% chicken in the chunk), cereals, derivatives of vegetable origin, minerals, various sugars. With Duck: Meat and animal derivatives (34%, including 4% duck in the chunk), cereals, derivatives of vegetable origin, minerals, various sugars. With Poultry: Meat and animal derivatives (34%, including 4% poultry in the chunk), cereals, derivatives of vegetable origin, minerals, various sugars. With Turkey: Meat and animal derivatives (34%, including 4% turkey in the chunk), cereals, derivatives of vegetable origin, minerals, various sugars. Chunk typically 40% of product. Guaranteed Analysis Nutrient Value (%) Protein 7.3 Fat Content 4.0 Crude Fibre 0.25 Inorganic Matter 1.6 Moisture 84.5 Additives (per kg): Vitamins: Vitamin C – 702 mg, Vitamin D₃ – 200 IU Amino Acids: Taurine – 620 mg Trace Elements: Copper (CuSO₄·5H₂O) – 1.2 mg, Iodine (Ca(IO₃)₂) – 0.22 mg, Iron (FeSO₄·H₂O) – 11.2 mg, Manganese (MnSO₄·H₂O) – 2.2 mg, Zinc (ZnSO₄·H₂O) – 16.2 mg Sensory Additives: Natural flavouring Why Choose WHISKAS 1+ Poultry Feasts Expertly formulated for adult cats aged 1 year and above Made with 100% complete, high-quality ingredients Promotes muscle tone, coat health, and immune strength Delicious gravy texture that cats love Produced sustainably using renewable energy sources Storage Instructions Store in a cool, dry place , away from direct sunlight and moisture. Once opened, refrigerate unused portions and consume within 2 days . Seal pouches tightly to preserve freshness and flavour. Feeding & Usage Feed according to your cat’s weight, age, and activity level . Serve at room temperature for maximum enjoyment and aroma. Always provide fresh drinking water alongside each meal. Diet Transition When switching your cat to WHISKAS 1+ Poultry Feasts , transition gradually over 7–8 days : Days 1–2: 25% new food, 75% old food Days 3–4: 50% new food, 50% old food Days 5–6: 75% new food, 25% old food Days 7–8: 100% new food Keep feeding times and routines consistent to avoid stress. Monitor your cat’s appetite and digestion; slow the transition if needed. Consult your vet for personalized advice. Delight your cat with the irresistible taste and nutrition of WHISKAS 1+ Poultry Feasts in Gravy — a wholesome, balanced meal that supports strength, vitality, and lifelong health, one pouch at a time.
